{
  "analysis": "FastText imported successfully; it just lacks a `__version__` attribute. Now I can proceed with data preparation and training. I need to convert the Parquet data to FastText format (`__label__X text`), train a supervised model, ensure accuracy >= 0.62 on the provided test set, keep the model under 150MB, and save it as `/app/model.bin`. I will need to manage hyperparameters and likely use quantization to keep the model small.",
  "plan": "I will run a Python script that: (1) loads train/test Parquet, (2) writes FastText-format files with cleaned text, (3) trains a supervised model with tuned hyperparameters, (4) evaluates on the provided test set, (5) quantizes the model to reduce size, (6) re-evaluates the quantized model, (7) saves it as `/app/model.bin`, and (8) prints accuracy and file size. I will start with moderate dimension and bucket sizes, then quantize.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/train_fasttext.py <<'PY'
import pandas as pd
import fasttext
import os
import re

def clean(text):
    text = str(text)
    text = text.replace('\n', ' ').replace('\r', ' ').replace('\t', ' ')
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text.lower()

print('Loading data...')
train = pd.read_parquet('/app/data/train-00000-of-00001.parquet')
test = pd.read_parquet('/app/data/test-00000-of-00001.parquet')

print('Writing fasttext format files...')
with open('/tmp/train_ft.txt', 'w') as f:
    for label, text in zip(train['label'], train['text']):
        f.write(f'__label__{int(label)} {clean(text)}\n')
with open('/tmp/test_ft.txt', 'w') as f:
    for label, text in zip(test['label'], test['text']):
        f.write(f'__label__{int(label)} {clean(text)}\n')

print('Training model...')
model = fasttext.train_supervised(
    input='/tmp/train_ft.txt',
    epoch=25,
    lr=1.0,
    wordNgrams=2,
    dim=100,
    bucket=500000,
    minCount=2,
    loss='softmax',
    thread=4,
    verbose=2,
)

print('Evaluating full model...')
n, p, r = model.test('/tmp/test_ft.txt')
print(f'Full model: n={n}, precision={p:.4f}, recall={r:.4f}')

print('Quantizing model...')
model.quantize(input='/tmp/train_ft.txt', retrain=True, qnorm=True, cutoff=100000, epoch=15, lr=1.0, thread=4)

print('Evaluating quantized model...')
n, p, r = model.test('/tmp/test_ft.txt')
print(f'Quantized model: n={n}, precision={p:.4f}, recall={r:.4f}')

print('Saving model...')
model.save_model('/app/model.bin')
size = os.path.getsize('/app/model.bin') / (1024*1024)
print(f'Model size: {size:.2f} MB')
print(f'Accuracy: {p:.4f}')
if size < 150 and p >= 0.62:
    print('SUCCESS: model meets constraints')
else:
    print('WARNING: model may not meet constraints')
PY
python3 /app/train_fasttext.py
",
      "duration": 60.0
    }
  ]
}
